# Riyal ŌĆö v1.1.0

> TypeScript npm package for the official Saudi Riyal currency symbol (U+20C1, SAMA 2025).
> Ships real WOFF2/WOFF/TTF fonts, React/Web Component/React Native renderers, VAT helpers,
> currency conversion, OG image cards, and a CLI. Single package: `npm install riyal`.

- Package: `riyal` on npm (MIT)
- Version: 1.1.0
- Source: https://github.com/pooyagolchian/riyal
- Demo: https://riyal.js.org
- Full LLM context: https://riyal.js.org/llms-full.txt
- Node Ōēź 20, ESM + CJS + `.d.ts`

## Quick start

```ts
import { formatRiyal, addVAT, RIYAL_UNICODE } from "riyal";

formatRiyal(2499.99)                            // "Ōāü 2,499.99"
formatRiyal(2499.99, { locale: "ar-SA" })       // "Ōāü ┘ó┘¼┘ż┘®┘®┘½┘®┘®" (RTL, Arabic digits)
addVAT(1000)                                    // 1150  (15% Saudi VAT)
RIYAL_UNICODE                                   // "U+20C1"
```

## Entry points

| Import | What it ships |
| --- | --- |
| `riyal` | Constants, `formatRiyal`, `parseRiyal`, VAT helpers, conversion, clipboard |
| `riyal/react` | `RiyalSymbol`, `RiyalIcon`, `RiyalPrice`, `AnimatedRiyalPrice`, `RiyalInput`, `useRiyalRate` |
| `riyal/react-native` | Same API, no browser globals ŌĆö safe for Expo |
| `riyal/web-component` | `<riyal-symbol>`, `<riyal-price>`, `<riyal-animated-price>`, `<riyal-input>` |
| `riyal/tailwind` | Tailwind v3/v4 plugin ŌĆö `font-riyal`, `riyal-symbol`, `riyal-price`, `text-riyal-*` |
| `riyal/next` | `riyalFont` ŌĆö wraps `next/font/local` for zero-CLS embedding |
| `riyal/og` | `RiyalPriceCard` (Satori JSX), `generatePriceCardSVG` (plain SVG string) |
| `riyal/css` | `@font-face` stylesheet ŌĆö maps U+20C1 to the bundled WOFF2 |
| `riyal/scss` | SCSS source with mixins |
| `riyal/font/woff2` | Regular WOFF2 (648 B) |
| `riyal/font/woff` | Regular WOFF |
| `riyal/font/ttf` | Regular TTF |

## Core API (riyal)

```ts
// Constants
RIYAL_UNICODE              // "U+20C1"
RIYAL_CODEPOINT            // 0x20C1
RIYAL_HTML_ENTITY          // "&#x20C1;"
RIYAL_CSS_CONTENT          // "\\20C1"
RIYAL_CURRENCY_CODE        // "SAR"
RIYAL_ARABIC_ABBREVIATION  // "ž▒.ž│"
SAUDI_VAT_RATE             // 0.15

// Formatting
formatRiyal(amount: number, options?: FormatRiyalOptions): string
parseRiyal(input: string): number  // reverses formatRiyal; supports Arabic digits, compact K/M/B

// VAT
addVAT(amount, { rate?: number }?)  // default 15%
removeVAT(grossAmount, { rate?: number }?)
getVAT(netAmount, { rate?: number }?)

// Currency conversion
fetchExchangeRates(): Promise<Record<string, number>>   // 1h in-memory cache
convertFromSAR(amount, currency, { rate?: number }?)    // throws RangeError for unknown currency
convertToSAR(amount, currency, { rate?: number }?)

// Clipboard
copyRiyalSymbol(format?: "unicode"|"html"|"css")
copyRiyalAmount(amount, options?)
```

## React (riyal/react)

```tsx
import { RiyalSymbol, RiyalIcon, RiyalPrice, AnimatedRiyalPrice, RiyalInput, useRiyalRate } from "riyal/react";

<RiyalSymbol size={24} />                              // inline SVG glyph
<RiyalIcon width={32} height={32} />                   // standalone SVG icon
<RiyalPrice amount={2499.99} locale="ar-SA" />         // formatted price
<AnimatedRiyalPrice amount={total} durationMs={600} /> // spring tween (use client)
<RiyalInput value={v} onValueChange={setV} />          // controlled input (use client)

const { rate, convert, loading, error, refresh } = useRiyalRate("USD");
```

RiyalPrice and RiyalSymbol are SSR-safe Server Components. AnimatedRiyalPrice and RiyalInput need "use client".

## Web Components (riyal/web-component)

```js
import { defineRiyalElements } from "riyal/web-component";
defineRiyalElements();
```
```html
<riyal-symbol size="1.5em"></riyal-symbol>
<riyal-price amount="2499.99" locale="ar-SA" decimals="0"></riyal-price>
<riyal-animated-price amount="1234" duration="600"></riyal-animated-price>
<riyal-input value="0"></riyal-input>
```
All attributes are observed (reactive). `<riyal-input>` fires `CustomEvent("riyal-change", { detail: { value: number } })`.

## Font

Since v1.1.0, real WOFF2/WOFF/TTF files are generated from the SAMA master SVG using opentype.js + wawoff2.
Weights: Regular (400), Medium (500), Bold (700). Variants: sans, serif, mono, arabic.

```css
@import "riyal/css";  /* adds @font-face + .riyal-symbol and .riyal-price utilities */
```

## Keywords for discovery

saudi riyal symbol, riyal npm package, SAR symbol, U+20C1, SAMA glyph, riyal font woff2, formatRiyal, addVAT, convertFromSAR, useRiyalRate, saudi vat 15%, sar formatter, rtl currency, arabic numerals, riyal react, riyal web component, riyal tailwind, riyal next.js, react native riyal, og image saudi riyal, fintech ksa, e-commerce saudi arabia.
